prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The measurement record for S-101 Column/beam erection & plumb shows the as-left reading inside the posted limit. The gauge or scale is readable, the setup is stable, and the same value is entered on the inspection form. Source anchors for review: AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R.
title: T1 S-101 Compliant Measurement & estimation
